channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Madonna Manager Guy Oseary Praises Sabrina Carpenter After Coachella Set: ‘Always Shown Love for the Queen’
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest music news. I'm your host, and today we're talking about a show-stopping collaboration at Coachella 2026.
[Music transitions to a Coachella-themed sound]
Host: Madonna, the Queen of Pop, made a surprise appearance during Sabrina Carpenter's headlining set on Friday, April 17. The two performed a teaser of a new song from Madonna's upcoming Confessions II album, as well as duets of "Vogue" and "Like a Prayer."
[Short clip of "Vogue" plays]
Host: Madonna's manager, Guy Oseary, took to social media to celebrate this full-circle moment for the Queen of Pop, who first performed at Coachella 20 years ago in 2006. Oseary expressed his gratitude to Carpenter and her team, saying "She has always shown love for the Queen, repeatedly… and last night the mutual love was shown and shared with the world."
[Music transitions to a clip of Sabrina Carpenter's music]
Host: Carpenter showed her appreciation for the shout-out, commenting with three pink revolving heart emojis. She also reflected on the experience on her Instagram, saying "Last night was straight out of a dream. spending so much time laughing with you and then above all sharing the stage with you is a privilege I’ll never forget."
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in to our podcast, and we'll catch you in the next one.
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
